note: Codex Browser verified the active individual profile visibility tab on port 33180 after removing LinkedIn public visibility controls. The rendered surface showed Public Page visibility, no LinkedIn/LinkedIn confidence/LinkedIn URL copy, one main landmark, no overflow, no runtime error, and no console warnings/errors.
